taxonomy: Grona brevipedicellata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Grona, which is a part of the subfamily Faboideae. Grona brevipedicellata is a legume native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Uganda. The classification of Grona brevipedicellata is further categorized into the tribe Phaseoleae, a group of legumes that includes beans and peas. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships and characteristics of the plant.
